name: image-template-momotaro-explainer-slide-in-hybrid-style
title: Momotaro Explainer Slide in Hybrid Style
description: A prompt that combines the simple, warm aesthetic of Irasutoya illustrations with the high-information density characteristic of Japanese government slides.

query.en: Create an explanatory slide ({argument name="format" default="ponchi-e diagram"}) for {argument name="theme" default="Momotaro"} that fuses the gentle atmosphere of "Irasutoya" with the overwhelming information density of "Kasumigaseki slides".
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Create an explanatory slide ({argument name="format" default="ponchi-e diagram"}) for {argument name="theme" default="Momotaro"} that fuses the gentle atmosphere of "Irasutoya" with the overwhelming information density of "Kasumigaseki slides".
